data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or outcomes from the simulation of the scenario. While the expected result mentions confirming behavior or producing a failure report, there are no traces or snapshots captured as required, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this step.
gaps: No evidence of scenario simulation results or captured traces.
